concept.title: Our
concept.p1: Expo Mexico Mujer 2027 is a platform for international encounters that transforms Mexican leadership into concrete actions, creating economic development opportunities and strengthening Mexico's identity abroad.
concept.p2: Our mission is to strengthen commercial, cultural, and social bridges between Mexico and Canada, consolidating a binational community that drives the growth of Mexican businesses, products, and talents.

audience.title: This is for those who
audience.desc: A space designed so each visitor finds their place at the expo and defines their role in this binational story.
audience.item1: Entrepreneurs looking to expand to Canada
audience.item2: Companies that want to sponsor with purpose
audience.quote: The expo needs a presence that feels institutional, contemporary, and ready to turn leadership into legacy.

agenda.title: Official Agenda
agenda.day1Text: Welcome, binational vision presentation, and meetings with strategic allies. Opening ceremony.
agenda.day2Text: Commercial exhibition panels, networking, business matchmaking, and sector showcases.
agenda.day3Text: Brand activations, media content, live interviews, and social visibility campaigns.
agenda.day4Text: Bilateral meetings, post-event continuity, agreement signings, and new collaboration routes.

noticias.title: Latest
noticias.desc: Stay up to date with the latest updates, calls, and official announcements heading into Expo Mexico Mujer.

visa.title: Immigration Services
visa.desc: We provide comprehensive advice and specialized processing for your Canadian entry visa. We handle the review and follow-up of your application to ensure your presence in Toronto quickly and without complications.

nosotros.title: About Us
nosotros.desc: A binational platform born from the conviction that Mexican women's leadership deserves a global stage. Five days in Toronto that transform identity into opportunity.

contacto.title: Connect with
contacto.desc: Immediate resolution for sponsorships, exhibition spaces, and strategic alliances for Expo Mexico Mujer 2027.

queEs.title: What is
queEs.desc: Discover our mission, vision, and strategic binational objectives that consolidate the commercial and cultural alliance between Mexico and Canada.

industrias.title: Participating
industrias.desc: A complete tour of the 12 key commercial sectors representing Mexico's innovation, quality, and tradition in Toronto.

ottawa2026.title: Expo Mexico Mujer
ottawa2026.desc: Relive the best moments from our previous edition in the Canadian capital. Historic results in commercial and cultural networking.

expositores.title: Exhibitors
expositores.desc: Discover the women leaders and entrepreneurs who will represent Mexico in Toronto. An exceptional showcase of innovation, culture, and quality ready to conquer the Canadian market.

embajadoras.title: Ambassadors
embajadoras.desc: Meet the ambassadors of Expo Mexico Mujer. Exceptional women whose careers, leadership, and influence connect borders and elevate Mexican pride internationally.

participa.title: Join the
participa.desc: Be an active part of the most relevant business and cultural encounter between Mexico and Canada. Commercial stands, state calls, premium sponsorships, and business roundtables.

aliados.title: Partners &
aliados.desc: Meet the binational chambers, governments, and institutions from Mexico and Canada that actively support Expo Mexico Mujer.

compradores.title: Buyers &
compradores.desc: Unique opportunities for direct commercial networking with premium brands of Mexican talent and business culture in Canada.

agenda.title: Official
agenda.desc: Discover the events, keynote speeches, panels, and cultural activities that will bring the five days of Expo Mexico Mujer 2027 in Toronto to life.

summit.title: Mexico Ontario
summit.desc: The strategic encounter designed to consolidate commercial agreements, foster mutual investments, and build direct operational bridges between the Mexican businesswomen delegation and Ontario's corporate leaders.

fashionshow.title: Mexican Fashion
fashionshow.desc: An exceptional night where Mexico's textile and artisanal richness converges with global runways in Toronto, showcasing the talent of independent designers to Canadian distributors and media.

womenleaders.title: Women Leaders
womenleaders.desc: An intellectual and interactive space to debate, share, and establish guidelines on the fundamental role of women's leadership and global corporate growth in the Mexico-Canada bilateral relationship.

mision.title: Trade Mission
mision.desc: Direct market exploration in the province of Quebec. The business delegation travels to analyze local channels and establish business meetings prior to the central exhibition in Toronto.

academy.title: Academy
academy.desc: Boost your skills and knowledge with our educational program. Exclusive sessions designed to drive the growth of women entrepreneurs in the global market.

informacion.title: Participant
informacion.desc: Find the technical assembly manual, export and logistics tools, hotel rates, and direct contact channels.

prensa.title: Coverage &
prensa.desc: Access press releases, media coverage, delegation interviews, and the Expo Mexico Mujer photo gallery.

participantes.title: Exhibitor
participantes.desc: Technical assembly instructions, booth requirements, general regulations, and frequently asked questions.

logistica.title: International Logistics
logistica.desc: Operational guidelines for temporary and permanent imports, merchandise consolidation, and Mexico-Canada customs services.

viajero.title: Traveler
viajero.desc: Preferential hotel rates, recommended flight information, and operational guides for local transportation in Toronto.

contactoInfo.title: Contact
contactoInfo.desc: Venue address, digital business cards of our directors, and direct attention form.

noticias.title: Latest
noticias.desc: Stay up to date with the latest news, official announcements, and featured articles about Expo Mexico Mujer and women's empowerment.

patrocinadores.title: Sponsors &
patrocinadores.desc: Meet the companies and corporations that make Expo Mexico Mujer possible, driving commercial development and women's leadership between Mexico and Canada.

invitados.title: Special
invitados.desc: Distinguished figures from the business, political, and cultural fields who enrich our program with their vision and international experience.

footer.brandDesc: The leading binational platform for networking, culture, and commercial development between Mexico and Canada.
footer.derechos: All rights reserved © 2027 Expo Mexico Mujer.
